wraith.name: Rolls-Royce Wraith
wraith.description: The most powerful and dynamic Rolls-Royce ever - a fastback grand tourer.

images.blackBadgeAlt: Rolls-Royce Wraith Black Badge in dramatic Dubai setting
images.grandTourerAlt: Wraith grand tourer cruising Dubai's luxury districts
images.frontDesignAlt: Wraith distinctive front design and Spirit of Ecstasy

exclusive: Satellite Aided Transmission with GPS pre-selection

blackBadge.title: Wraith Black Badge
blackBadge.description: The most potent expression of Wraith with enhanced power and darkened aesthetic.
features: Black Badge interior with carbon fiber
blackBadge.subtitle: Alter Your Perspective

grandTouring.title: Grand Touring Excellence
grandTouring.description: Perfect for long-distance luxury travel with supreme comfort and power

nightCruising.title: Night Cruising
nightCruising.description: Command the city's attention with a dramatic presence under the Dubai skyline.

desertHighway.title: Desert Highway
desertHighway.description: Experience the raw power of the V12 on long, open desert roads.

trackExperience.title: Track Experience
trackExperience.description: Unleash the full potential of the Wraith at the Dubai Autodrome.

cityLuxury.title: Urban Sophistication
cityLuxury.description: Command attention in Dubai's luxury districts with unmatched presence

performance.title: Dynamic Performance
performance.description: Experience the most powerful Rolls-Royce with thrilling acceleration

performance.title: Raw Power
performance.description: Experience 632 hp of pure Rolls-Royce power with satellite-aided transmission.

design.title: Fastback Elegance
design.description: The Wraith's dramatic fastback silhouette creates an unmistakably powerful presence.

technology.title: Intelligent Luxury
technology.description: Advanced technology is seamlessly integrated to enhance the driving experience without complication.

transmission.title: Satellite Aided Transmission
transmission.description: Uses GPS data to predict the road ahead and select the optimal gear for upcoming corners and terrain.

headliner.title: Starlight Headliner
headliner.description: A celestial canopy of fiber-optic lights that can be customized to your personal star-sign.

audio.title: Bespoke Audio System
audio.description: 18 speakers and 1300W of power create a perfect acoustic environment, tuned by Rolls-Royce engineers.

vision.title: Night Vision
vision.description: Infrared camera detects pedestrians and animals up to 300m away, enhancing safety at night.

satellite.title: Satellite Aided Transmission
satellite.description: Uses GPS data to pre-select optimal gears for seamless power delivery.

bespoke.title: Bespoke Audio System
bespoke.description: 18 speakers perfectly tuned for the Wraith's unique interior.

starlight.title: Starlight Headliner
starlight.description: 1,340 fiber-optic lights create a personalized constellation.

experience.title: Grand Touring Excellence
experience.description: The Wraith is designed to be driven. Discover the perfect Dubai routes to experience its full potential.
